% Auto-generated by scripts/aggregate_celeba_unified_table.py.
% TanGCE family naming: \TanGCEp = LEACE + manifold; the CelebA pipeline does
% not include the rank-2 CovMatch K=2 step that the NLP \TanGCEpp pipeline uses,
% so the CelebA headline is \TanGCEp (not \TanGCEpp). \AmbGCEp is the matched
% ambient ablation (LEACE + ambient iterative loop).
\begin{table}[t]
\centering
\caption{\textbf{CelebA cross-modal results (CLIP ViT-B/32, 40 binary attributes).} \emph{Leakage (pp)}: signed $S - S_{\text{floor}}$ at the trajectory step closest to the per-attribute majority-class chance; $0$ = at chance, lower in absolute value = stronger erasure. \emph{@chance}: settings driven to chance ($|S{-}S_{\text{floor}}| \le 0.5$pp) over settings the method reached the budget on. Each method is run on 40 attributes under each control regime (5 least- vs.\ 5 most-correlated controls per target). The CelebA pipeline uses \TanGCEp{} (LEACE preprocessing + manifold loop); the rank-2 covariance step that yields the NLP \TanGCEpp{} headline was not run on CelebA. Best per column in \textbf{bold}. `--' = no in-budget step at that budget for that method.}
\label{tab:celeba_unified_summary}
